rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped background citation in the customer satisfaction application, used to justify the practical importance of top-box satisfaction by noting higher repurchase among highly satisfied customers. The citing paper does not build on Mittal and Kamakura's specific model, moderators, or estimation approach, and its main theoretical development is a separate direct-versus-indirect prediction argument. There is no distinct methodological or conceptual dependency on this specific cited work beyond general motivation.
